raw_consumer_statement: I PURCHASED A JACKET FOR {$100.00} FROM MACY 'S ( ORDER # XXXX ) ON XX/XX/year> AND RETURNED IT IN STORE ON XX/XX/year> BECAUSE IT WAS TOO SMALL AND I RE-ORDERED IT IN A BIGGER SIZE ONLINE. I AM INITIATING THIS COMPLAINT BECAUSE AS OF TODAY XX/XX/year>, I HAVE NOT RECEIVED MY REFUND OF {$100.00}. I CALLED MACY 'S ON XX/XX/year> AND WAS TOLD BY A REPRESENTATIVE THAT MY REFUND WAS PUT ON A GIFT CARD IN WHICH IT SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN BECAUSE I MADE THE PURCHASE WITH MY DEBIT CARD ; THEREFORE, THE REFUND SHOULD HAVE BEEN RETURNED TO THE ORIGINAL FORM OF PAYMENT. THE REPRESENTATIVE FURTHER STATED THAT SHE WOULD TRANSFER THE REFUND FROM THE GIFT CARD TO MY DEBIT CARD. I WAITED A FEW DAYS AND WHEN THE REFUND HAD NOT BEEN CREDITED BACK TO MY DEBIT CARD BY XX/XX/year>, I CALLED MACY 'S AGAIN AND WAS TOLD BY A SUPERVISOR NAMED " XXXX '' THAT THE REFUND SHOULD POST TO MY ACCOUNT BY FRIDAY XX/XX/year> AND THAT HE WOULD CALL ME TO VERIFY THAT IT WAS. ON XX/XX/year>, I WAITED UNTIL XXXXXXXX XXXX FOR XXXX 'S CALL AND WHEN HE DIDN'T CALL ME, I CALLED MACY 'S AGAIN AND SPOKE WITH ANOTHER SUPERVISOR NAMED " XXXX '' WHO DID NOTHING TO HELP ME. HE TOLD ME TO WAIT UNTIL THE END OF THE DAY FOR THE REFUND TO BE POSTED TO MY DEBIT CARD, BUT HE COULD NOT STATE WHAT HE CONSIDERED TO BE THE END OF THE DAY. HE OFFERED NO RESOLUTIONS OTHER THAN FOR ME TO WAIT AND IF I DIDN'T GET THE REFUND, CALL MACY 'S BACK THE FOLLOWING DAY. I AM APALLED AT THE FACT THAT I RETURNED AN ITEM TO THEM 2 WEEKS AGO AND I STILL DON'T HAVE MY REFUND WHICH SHOULD HAVE BEEN POSTED TO MY ACCOUNT WITHIN 2-3 DAYS AS IT USUALLY IS.
